description.value: > Feather Associated Domain: Animal. Add Fly to your list of class skills. In addition, whenever you cast a spell that grants you a fly speed, your maneuverability increases by one step (up to perfect). Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the speak with animals power of the Animal domain. Eyes of the Hawk (Ex): You gain a racial bonus on Perception checks equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1). In addition, if you can act during a surprise round, you receive a +2 racial bonus on your Initiative check. Replacement Domain Spells: 2ndâ feather fall, 3rdâ fly, 6thâ mass fly.
